title: Asylum accommodation at military sites: factsheets
body: "Cameron Barracks (Inverness) and Crowborough Training Camp (East Sussex) are being considered for use as temporary accommodation for asylum seekers.  The factsheets explain the purpose of using Cameron Barracks and Crowborough Training Camp as temporary accommodation for asylum seekers who would otherwise be destitute.  The sites are part of the government’s commitment to exit hotel use and provide more suitable, managed accommodation. "
